titles.title: UncertRadio: Software for determining characteristic limits in accordance to DIN EN ISO 11929 for radioactivity measurements

citation.article_title: Determination of the characteristic limits (decision threshold, detection limit and limits of the coverage interval) for measurements of ionizing radiation — Fundamentals and application; Part 4: Guidelines to applications
